name: claude-m-microsoft-marketplace
description: Focused Claude marketplace for Microsoft workflow plugins maintained in this repository.

plugins.name: microsoft-teams-mcp
plugins.description: Send messages, create meetings, and manage Teams channels via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-excel-mcp
plugins.description: Read and update workbooks, worksheets, ranges, and tables via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-outlook-mcp
plugins.description: Send email and manage inbox/calendar tasks via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-azure-mcp
plugins.description: Inspect subscriptions, resource groups, and resources via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-sharepoint-mcp
plugins.description: Browse and transfer SharePoint files through MCP tools.

plugins.name: excel-office-scripts
plugins.description: Deep knowledge of Excel Office Scripts (TypeScript 4.0.3, ExcelScript API) and Power Automate cloud flow creation via Dataverse Web API.

plugins.name: m365-platform-clients
plugins.description: TypeScript patterns for Dataverse Web API and Microsoft Graph with shared Azure Identity auth, typed clients, and combined provisioning workflows.

plugins.name: excel-automation
plugins.description: Clean messy data with pandas, generate Office Scripts and Power Automate flows, and create Excel templates — with Dataverse-aware mode and VBA fallback.

plugins.name: m365-admin
plugins.description: M365 tenant admin via Microsoft Graph — users, groups, licenses, Exchange Online, SharePoint, and CSV-driven bulk operations.

plugins.name: dataverse-schema
plugins.description: Create and manage Dataverse tables, columns, relationships, and solutions via Web API — with FetchXML generation and data seeding.

plugins.name: powerbi-fabric
plugins.description: Generate DAX measures, Power Query M code, manage workspaces via REST API, scaffold PBIP projects, and integrate with Microsoft Fabric.

plugins.name: powerplatform-alm
plugins.description: Application lifecycle management — environment provisioning, solution transport, CI/CD pipeline generation, and PCF control scaffolding.

plugins.name: onedrive
plugins.description: OneDrive file management via Microsoft Graph — upload, download, share, search, and delta sync for personal and business drives.

plugins.name: planner-todo
plugins.description: Task and project management via Microsoft Graph — Planner plans, buckets, tasks, assignments, and To Do lists with steps and recurrence.

plugins.name: azure-devops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps project management — Git repos, YAML pipelines, work items, pull requests, WIQL queries, and artifact feeds via REST API.

plugins.name: entra-id-security
plugins.description: Microsoft Entra ID identity governance — app registrations, service principals, conditional access policies, sign-in log analysis, and risk detection.

plugins.name: powerapps
plugins.description: Power Apps development — canvas app Power Fx formulas, model-driven app configuration, custom connectors, component libraries, and solution checker.

plugins.name: azure-cost-governance
plugins.description: Azure FinOps and governance workflows — query costs, monitor budgets, detect anomalies, and identify idle resources for optimization.

plugins.name: power-automate
plugins.description: Design and troubleshoot Power Automate cloud flows — trigger/action patterns, run diagnostics, retries, and deployment-safe flow definitions.

plugins.name: purview-compliance
plugins.description: Compliance and information protection guidance for Microsoft Purview — DLP, retention, sensitivity labels, and eDiscovery workflows.

plugins.name: azure-policy-security
plugins.description: Evaluate Azure policy compliance and security posture — policy assignments, drift analysis, remediation planning, and guardrail recommendations.

plugins.name: lighthouse-health
plugins.description: Multi-tenant health dashboard for MSPs/CSPs — green/yellow/red scoring for security posture, MFA coverage, stale accounts, and licensing anomalies with one-click remediation plans.

plugins.name: license-optimizer
plugins.description: Identify inactive and underused M365 licenses, map downgrade/upgrade candidates, estimate monthly savings, and generate multi-tenant Lighthouse reports for customer review meetings.

plugins.name: exchange-mailflow
plugins.description: Guided 'email not received' diagnostics — message trace, transport rules, quarantine, connectors, and SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks with client-safe explanations.

plugins.name: sharing-auditor
plugins.description: Audit external sharing across SharePoint and OneDrive — find overshared links, anonymous access, and stale guest users with approval-based revocation tasks.

plugins.name: teams-lifecycle
plugins.description: Create and archive teams with templates, enforce naming and ownership, apply sensitivity labels, and run expiration reviews — using non-technical 'project start/end' language.

plugins.name: servicedesk-runbooks
plugins.description: Guided workflows for common IT tickets — shared mailbox access, MFA reset, file recovery, and password reset with pre-checks, approval gates, and end-user verification.

plugins.name: microsoft-bookings
plugins.description: Microsoft Bookings — manage appointment calendars, services, staff availability, and customer bookings via Graph API.

plugins.name: microsoft-forms-surveys
plugins.description: Microsoft Forms — create surveys, add questions, collect responses, and summarize results via Graph API.

plugins.name: microsoft-lists-tracker
plugins.description: Microsoft Lists — create and manage lists for process tracking, issue logs, and project trackers via Graph API.

plugins.name: copilot-studio-bots
plugins.description: Copilot Studio — design bot topics, author trigger phrases, configure generative AI orchestration, and publish chatbots.

plugins.name: onenote-knowledge-base
plugins.description: OneNote Knowledge Base — read, create, and search notebooks, sections, and pages via Graph API for team documentation.

plugins.name: marketplace-dev-tools
plugins.description: Research Microsoft APIs, scaffold new plugins, extend existing ones, and audit marketplace coverage gaps.

plugins.name: power-pages
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Pages — sites, page templates, Liquid, web forms, table permissions, web roles, and Dataverse portal integration

plugins.name: azure-web-apps
plugins.description: Azure App Service — create, deploy, and manage web apps, deployment slots, custom domains, and TLS certificates via ARM REST API

plugins.name: azure-static-web-apps
plugins.description: Azure Static Web Apps — JAMstack/SPA hosting with built-in auth, API backends, PR preview environments, and staticwebapp.config.json management

plugins.name: teams-app-dev
plugins.description: Custom Teams app development — Adaptive Cards, message extensions, bot handlers, tab apps, manifest authoring, and Teams Toolkit CLI workflows.

plugins.name: azure-storage
plugins.description: Azure Storage — Blob, Queue, Table, and Files services with lifecycle policies, SAS tokens, and managed identity access

plugins.name: azure-functions
plugins.description: Azure Functions — triggers, bindings, Durable Functions, deployment, and local development with Azure Functions Core Tools

plugins.name: azure-containers
plugins.description: Azure Container Apps, Container Instances, and Container Registry — build, push, deploy, and scale containerized workloads

plugins.name: azure-sql-database
plugins.description: Azure SQL Database and Cosmos DB — provisioning, schema management, query optimization, security hardening, and backup/restore

plugins.name: azure-key-vault
plugins.description: Azure Key Vault — secrets, keys, and certificates management with RBAC, rotation policies, and managed identity integration

plugins.name: azure-monitor
plugins.description: Azure Monitor, Application Insights, and Log Analytics — metrics, alerts, KQL queries, dashboards, and diagnostic settings

plugins.name: azure-networking
plugins.description: Azure Networking — VNets, subnets, NSGs, Load Balancers, Front Door, DNS zones, VPN gateways, and Private Link

plugins.name: fabric-data-engineering
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Data Engineering — lakehouses, Spark notebooks, data pipelines, Delta Lake tables, and lakehouse SQL endpoints

plugins.name: fabric-data-warehouse
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Data Warehouse — Synapse warehouses, T-SQL DDL/DML, cross-database queries, stored procedures, and data modeling

plugins.name: fabric-real-time-analytics
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Real-Time Analytics — Eventhouse, KQL databases, eventstreams, Real-Time Dashboards, and streaming ingestion

plugins.name: fabric-data-factory
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Data Factory — data pipelines, Dataflow Gen2, Copy activity, orchestration patterns, and scheduling

plugins.name: fabric-data-science
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Data Science — ML experiments, model training, MLflow tracking, PREDICT function, and semantic link integration

plugins.name: fabric-data-activator
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Data Activator — Reflex triggers, condition-based alerts, real-time actions, and event-driven automation on Fabric data

plugins.name: fabric-onelake
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric OneLake — unified data lake, shortcuts, file explorer, ADLS Gen2 APIs, and cross-workspace data access

plugins.name: fabric-semantic-models
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models — Direct Lake modeling, DAX governance, calculation groups, XMLA deployment, and semantic link automation

plugins.name: fabric-gitops-cicd
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric GitOps CI/CD — workspace Git integration, deployment pipelines, artifact promotion, branch strategy, and release validation

plugins.name: fabric-capacity-ops
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Capacity Operations — CU monitoring, throttling diagnostics, workload tuning, autoscale planning, and cost-performance optimization

plugins.name: fabric-mirroring
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Mirroring — source onboarding, CDC replication, latency monitoring, schema drift handling, and reconciliation workflows

plugins.name: fabric-security-governance
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Security Governance — workspace RBAC, RLS/OLS patterns, sensitivity labels, lineage controls, and audit readiness

plugins.name: fabric-observability
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric Observability — Monitor Hub triage, notebook/pipeline reliability runbooks, SLA tracking, alert design, and incident diagnostics

plugins.name: microsoft-docs-mcp
plugins.description: Search and fetch official Microsoft documentation via the Learn MCP server.

plugins.name: azure-tenant-assessment
plugins.description: Entry-point Azure tenant assessment — subscription inventory, resource catalog, security posture snapshot, and plugin setup recommendations.

plugins.name: sharepoint-file-intelligence
plugins.description: Scan, categorize, deduplicate, and organize SharePoint and OneDrive files at scale using Microsoft Graph.

plugins.name: process-task-mining
plugins.description: Process and task mining from M365, Power Automate, and Azure Monitor logs — extract event logs, discover process models, analyze performance, and check conformance.

plugins.name: azure-graph-dotnet
plugins.description: Scaffold and build Microsoft Graph C# / .NET solutions on Azure — Functions, Container Jobs, Azure Identity, Polly resilience, and SharePoint file intelligence implementations.

plugins.name: agent-foundry
plugins.description: Azure AI Foundry agent lifecycle management — scaffold, deploy, test, and manage AI agents with Azure AI Foundry MCP integration for agent service, model deployments, and evaluations.

plugins.name: defender-sentinel
plugins.description: Microsoft Sentinel SIEM/SOAR and Defender XDR — incident triage, KQL threat hunting, analytics rules, SOAR playbooks, and advanced hunting across device, identity, email, and cloud app signals.

plugins.name: azure-ai-services
plugins.description: Azure AI workloads — Azure OpenAI Service deployments, AI Search indexes and RAG pipelines, AI Studio/Foundry projects, Cognitive Services provisioning, content filtering, and responsible AI governance.

plugins.name: dynamics-365-crm
plugins.description: Dynamics 365 Sales and Customer Service via Dataverse Web API — leads, opportunities, accounts, contacts, cases, SLAs, queues, pipeline reporting, and CRM workflow automation.

plugins.name: dynamics-365-field-service
plugins.description: Dynamics 365 Field Service via Dataverse Web API — work orders, bookings, resource scheduling, service accounts, customer assets, incident types, and IoT-triggered service events.

plugins.name: dynamics-365-project-ops
plugins.description: Dynamics 365 Project Operations via Dataverse Web API — projects, WBS, time and expense tracking, resource assignments, project contracts, invoice proposals, and billing actuals.

plugins.name: azure-dotnet-webapp
plugins.description: Scaffold and build ASP.NET Core Web API and Blazor apps on Azure — Minimal API, controllers, Microsoft.Identity.Web, EF Core, SignalR, OpenAPI, App Service deployment, and Graph API integration patterns.

plugins.name: lighthouse-operations
plugins.description: Deep operational tooling for Azure Lighthouse delegation and M365 Lighthouse multi-tenant management — GDAP lifecycle, Bicep delegation templates, baseline compliance, cross-tenant governance, alert management, and monthly MSP health reports.

plugins.name: msp-tenant-provisioning
plugins.description: End-to-end new customer onboarding for MSPs and CSPs — CSP tenant creation via Partner Center API, M365 security baseline (CA policies, PIM, break-glass), custom domain DNS setup, Azure subscription and Defender for Cloud, and full Lighthouse management enrollment.

plugins.name: business-central
plugins.description: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central ERP — finance, supply chain, and inventory management via BC OData v4 / API v2.0 REST API.
